mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, template_name, template_code, usage_scene, business_category, domain_category, template_tags, description, prompt_content, example_input, status, del_flag, is_recommended, sort_order, use_count, test_count, download_count, remark, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.tenant_id, t.template_name, t.template_code, t.usage_scene, t.business_category, t.domain_category, t.template_tags, t.description, LEFT(t.prompt_content, 240) AS content_summary, t.example_input, t.status, t.is_recommended, t.sort_order, t.use_count, t.test_count, t.download_count, t.remark, t.create_by, cu.real_name AS creator_name, t.create_time, t.update_by, uu.real_name AS updater_name, t.update_time FROM ai_prompt_template t LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON cu.tenant_id = t.tenant_id AND cu.id = t.create_by AND cu.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user uu ON uu.tenant_id = t.tenant_id AND uu.id = t.update_by AND uu.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY t.is_recommended DESC, t.sort_order ASC, t.update_time DESC, t.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_prompt_template SET use_count = use_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0' AND status = '0'
UPDATE ai_prompt_template SET test_count = test_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0' AND status = '0'
UPDATE ai_prompt_template SET download_count = download_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0' AND status = '0'
